articles.title: Officials: Man who shot 2 in Hampton Beach before dying by suicide was active-duty Navy sailor
articles.description:
The man, who fatally shot himself after injuring two others, was living in New Hampshire because of his assignment with the U.S. Navy, law enforcement officials said.

The post Officials: Man who shot 2 in Hampton Beach before dying by suicide was active-duty Navy sailor appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Active-duty Navy sailor shot two people at Hampton Beach before dying by suicide.
The incident occurred on July 6, 2026, impacting local safety concerns.
Residents may face increased security measures and mental health resources in response.

articles.title: Report: Celtics’ Paul George turned down $3.9 million trade bonus
articles.description:
George had a bonus in his contract which would have taken his cap hit up to the $57.7 million league maximum.

The post Report: Celtics’ Paul George turned down $3.9 million trade bonus appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics' Paul George declined a $3.9 million trade bonus in his contract.
This decision affects his cap hit, which remains at $57.7 million maximum.
George's choice could influence the Celtics' roster flexibility for upcoming trades.

articles.title: R.I. food bank thanks Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce for pre-wedding donation
articles.description:
"As the need across our communities continues to grow, this $1 million donation will go a long way in helping us purchase and distribute the nutritious, culturally appropriate food that Rhode Islanders deserve," the food bank's CEO says.

The post R.I. food bank thanks Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce for pre-wedding donation appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce donated $1 million to a Rhode Island food bank.
The donation will help purchase and distribute nutritious food for local communities.
Food bank CEO highlights growing need for culturally appropriate food in Rhode Island.
